Blockchain Engineering.title: NFT Rentals & Sales Protocol
Blockchain Engineering.description:
- Implements ERC-4907 rentable NFTs with time-bounded user rights and ERC-2981 royalty support.
- Combines rental listings, booking/check-in flow, and escrowed deposit/payment settlement across dedicated contracts.
- Adds sales listings for atomic NFT purchases with pull-based payouts and reentrancy-protected fund handling.
Blockchain Engineering.shortDescription: Solidity protocol for ERC-4907 NFT rentals and atomic sales with escrowed settlement.

Blockchain Engineering.title: DAO - Community Grants Governance
Blockchain Engineering.description: OpenZeppelin Governor + Timelock DAO for proposing, voting, and executing ETH/ERC20 grants with treasury and vesting flows.
Blockchain Engineering.shortDescription: OpenZeppelin Governor + Timelock DAO for proposing, voting, and executing ETH/ERC20 grants with treasury and vesting flows.

Blockchain Engineering.title: Overcollateralized Stablecoin (DSC)
Blockchain Engineering.description:
- Issues DSC against WETH/WBTC collateral using Chainlink-priced USD valuations.
- Enforces overcollateralization and health-factor checks with configurable liquidation thresholds/bonuses.
- Supports mint/burn/redeem and liquidation flows with stale-oracle protection and Foundry test coverage.
Blockchain Engineering.shortDescription: MakerDAO-style DSC protocol with WETH/WBTC collateral, health-factor checks, and liquidations.

Blockchain Engineering.title: Swap - Decentralized Exchange
Blockchain Engineering.description:
- Implements Uniswap-style constant-product AMM pools with deterministic CREATE2 pair deployment.
- Supports liquidity add/remove, exact-input swaps, multi-hop routing, and deadline/slippage safeguards.
- Tracks cumulative prices for TWAP oracle reads and includes fuzz/unit tests in Foundry.
Blockchain Engineering.shortDescription: Uniswap-style AMM DEX with CREATE2 pairs, routing, LP management, and TWAP support.

Blockchain Engineering.title: Foundry Fund Me - Crowdfunding
Blockchain Engineering.description: Chainlink price-feed-backed crowdfunding dApp enforcing a USD minimum contribution, with Foundry tests and a React frontend.
Blockchain Engineering.shortDescription: Chainlink price-feed-backed crowdfunding dApp enforcing a USD minimum contribution, with Foundry tests and a React frontend.

Blockchain Engineering.title: Solidity AST Generator
Blockchain Engineering.description: JavaScript tool that parses Solidity source into an AST with node highlighting, traversal path display, and pinnable tree comparison.
Blockchain Engineering.shortDescription: JavaScript tool that parses Solidity source into an AST with node highlighting, traversal path display, and pinnable tree comparison.

AI & Intelligent Systems.title: Multi-PDF RAG Chatbot
AI & Intelligent Systems.description:
- Ingests multiple PDFs, chunks content with metadata, and indexes embeddings in ChromaDB.
- Runs a LangChain-based RAG pipeline to answer questions with contextual retrieval and source citations.
- Provides a Streamlit UI with streaming chat, document summaries, and page-level attribution.
AI & Intelligent Systems.shortDescription: LangChain + ChromaDB chatbot for multi-PDF Q&A with citations and summaries.

AI & Intelligent Systems.title: AI Multi-Agent Trading System
AI & Intelligent Systems.description:
- Orchestrates four autonomous trader agents (Buffett/Soros/Dalio/Wood styles) on a scheduled trading loop.
- Uses OpenAI Agents SDK plus MCP servers for accounts, market data, research tools, and push notifications.
- Persists trades/logs in SQLite and exposes real-time portfolio activity through a Gradio dashboard.
AI & Intelligent Systems.shortDescription: Multi-agent stock trading simulation with OpenAI Agents SDK, MCP tools, and Gradio monitoring.

AI & Intelligent Systems.title: Deal Finder AI - Multi-Agent
AI & Intelligent Systems.description:
- Uses scanner/planner/ensemble/messaging agents to discover and evaluate deals from online feeds.
- Combines LLM-based specialist/frontier estimators with a Random Forest model for ensemble price estimation.
- Sends qualified deal alerts via Pushover/Twilio and visualizes activity in a Gradio interface.
AI & Intelligent Systems.shortDescription: Multi-agent deal discovery system with LLM+ML price estimation and alert automation.

AI & Intelligent Systems.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction AI
AI & Intelligent Systems.description: Gradio app that trains and compares seven deep-learning/forecasting models to produce 7-day Bitcoin price projections.
AI & Intelligent Systems.shortDescription: Gradio app that trains and compares seven deep-learning/forecasting models to produce 7-day Bitcoin price projections.

AI & Intelligent Systems.title: Food Detector AI
AI & Intelligent Systems.description: End-to-end food image classifier comparing EfficientNet-B2 and ViT models, including training scripts, benchmarks, and Gradio inference UI.
AI & Intelligent Systems.shortDescription: End-to-end food image classifier comparing EfficientNet-B2 and ViT models, including training scripts, benchmarks, and Gradio inference UI.

AI & Intelligent Systems.title: Tiny Diffusion Model
AI & Intelligent Systems.description: Educational DDPM implementation with U-Net training, forward/reverse diffusion visualization, and sample generation for MNIST/Fashion-MNIST/anime data.
AI & Intelligent Systems.shortDescription: Educational DDPM implementation with U-Net training, diffusion visualization, and image sampling workflows.

Full-Stack & Software Architecture.title: Notebase - Personal Knowledge Base
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.description:
- Delivers instant Quill note-taking with optional cloud save, slug URLs, and password-protected notes.
- Organizes notebooks and source ingestion (URL/files/notes) via queued extraction pipeline and status tracking.
- Adds notebook-scoped RAG chat with cited answers, conversation memory, and Socialite auth (Google/GitHub).
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.shortDescription: Laravel knowledge workspace with notebook organization, source ingestion, and cited RAG chat.

Full-Stack & Software Architecture.title: Bangla Quran - Audio & Translation
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.description:
- Serves all 114 surahs with Arabic text, Bangla translation, and Abu Bakr Zakaria tafsir.
- Supports Arabic/Bangla recitation audio, searchable ayahs, bookmarks, and multiple reading modes.
- Ships as a responsive Next.js PWA with theme persistence and static-generation-friendly architecture.
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.shortDescription: Next.js Quran reader with Bangla translation/tafsir, audio recitation, search, bookmarks, and PWA support.

Full-Stack & Software Architecture.title: Multi-Room Chat App
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.description:
- Implements MERN chat with JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, and MongoDB-backed persistence.
- Supports public/private/request-to-join rooms with owner moderation and membership controls.
- Streams real-time messaging and presence updates through Socket.IO across React/Vite and Express services.
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.shortDescription: MERN real-time chat platform with privacy-aware rooms, moderation controls, and Socket.IO presence.

Full-Stack & Software Architecture.title: Task Time Tracker
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.description: Next.js frontend for daily task and time tracking with authenticated API integration and dashboard-focused UI components.
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.shortDescription: Next.js frontend for daily task and time tracking with authenticated API integration and dashboard-focused UI components.

Full-Stack & Software Architecture.title: Document Echo - TTS PDF Reader
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.description: Next.js PDF reader with sentence-level text-to-speech, synchronized highlighting, and IndexedDB caching with OpenAI/browser voice options.
Full-Stack & Software Architecture.shortDescription: Next.js PDF reader with sentence-level text-to-speech, synchronized highlighting, and IndexedDB caching with OpenAI/browser voice options.

Developer Tools & Utilities.title: Slugcopy - Slugify & Copy
Developer Tools & Utilities.description: Node.js CLI that slugifies text via @sindresorhus/slugify and copies the result to clipboard with configurable formatting flags.
Developer Tools & Utilities.shortDescription: Node.js CLI that slugifies text via @sindresorhus/slugify and copies the result to clipboard with configurable formatting flags.

Mini Apps.title: React Spelling Quiz
Mini Apps.description: React + Firebase spelling trainer with 835+ words, pronunciation audio, role-based access, and difficulty-based quiz flows.
Mini Apps.shortDescription: React + Firebase spelling trainer with 835+ words, pronunciation audio, role-based access, and difficulty-based quiz flows.

Mini Apps.title: Mental Math Trainer
Mini Apps.description: Vue 3 arithmetic practice app with customizable operations/ranges, timed quizzes, instant feedback, and session logs.
Mini Apps.shortDescription: Vue 3 arithmetic practice app with customizable operations/ranges, timed quizzes, instant feedback, and session logs.

Mini Apps.title: Always-On-Top Pomodoro Timer
Mini Apps.description: Lightweight Python desktop Pomodoro timer with always-on-top mode, resizing, adjustable durations, and transparency/font controls.
Mini Apps.shortDescription: Lightweight Python desktop Pomodoro timer with always-on-top mode, resizing, adjustable durations, and transparency/font controls.
